description:
An open-source, feature-packed alternative bootstrapper for Roblox.


Changes
- Changelogs for the most recent major version will now always show, even when updating to a minor version
- Errors from ipinfo.io now show up as notifications instead of message boxes
- Log file deletion now deletes all log files that are not the 15 most recent ones (thanks @otsako-vpk)
- RepeatBehavior attribute added to Image for custom bootstrappers (thanks @GoingCrazyDude)

Removals
- Rendering mode setting removed as it no longer functioned

Bug fixes
- Fixed Discord RPC breaking when RbxTransport was being used
- Fixed a crash when a file was locked when exporting data
- Fixed the allow list warning overflowing for certain languages
- Fixed a warning message showing up when joining a hidden game (private, friends only, 17+, etc.) with activity tracker on
- Fixed Chinese translations (thanks @otsako-vpk)
